mapper.update: update batch.worker_registry set status = 'DECOMMISSIONED', heartbeat_at = #{heartbeatAt}, drain_started_at = null, drain_deadline_at = null, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and worker_code = #{workerCode}
update batch.worker_registry set status = 'OFFLINE', updated_at = current_timestamp where status in ('ONLINE', 'DRAINING') and heartbeat_at < #{cutoff}
mapper.select: select tenant_id, worker_code, capability_tags::text as raw_value from batch.worker_registry where status in ('ONLINE', 'DRAINING') and capability_tags is not null and ( jsonb_typeof(capability_tags) <> 'array' or exists ( select 1 from jsonb_array_elements(capability_tags) elem where jsonb_typeof(elem) <> 'string' ) )
